subject: Pearly -> Twilit: marshal request pending Seaworthy ACK for quality-gate commit/push
body: Quality-gate sub-director heads-up/request to marshal path. I have asked Seaworthy to route commit/push for PR 108 Sonar + quality-gate fixes. Local state: Sonar fixes are already in unpushed commit 51a02a93; current TUI act-warning fix is still an unstaged modified file at agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts. If Seaworthy authorises, please marshal a narrow commit for the remaining TUI test fix, then push the branch so SonarCloud PR 108 can reanalyse. I am not staging or committing from my side.
